blur_detection.description: The text and edges are sharp with no visible blur.

contrast_assessment.description: Excellent contrast between text and background, ensuring clear text recognition.

glare_identification.description: No glare or bright spots detected that obscure text or important areas.

water_stains.description: No water stains or discoloration affecting document readability.

tears_or_folds.description: No visible tears, creases, folds, or wrinkles.

cut_off_detection.description: No document edges are cut off or excluded from the image frame.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections or incomplete parts of the receipt/invoice.

obstructions.description: No objects, fingers, shadows, or other elements obstructing document content.

classification.reasoning: The document contains multiple fields that indicate it is an expense document, specifically for a flight booking. The fields found include supplier, consumerRecipient, transactionAmount, transactionDate, invoiceReceiptNumber, itemDescriptionLineItems, and paymentMethod. The document is in English with high confidence and matches the expected location.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: The document contains 7 out of 8 required fields, confirming it as an expense document. The fields present include supplier (Philippine Airlines), consumerRecipient (Christine Ann B Cruz), transactionAmount (PHP 19,977.48), transactionDate (05 Jul 2025), invoiceReceiptNumber (XP6LCW), itemDescriptionLineItems (flight details), and paymentMethod (Mastercard XXXXXXXXXXXX3028).

extraction.special_notes: eTravel registration is required for travel to or from the Philippines. Register Now

issues.description: Description of Goods or Services must be detailed on the receipt, but the extracted data does not provide detailed descriptions of the services.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Description of Goods or Services must be detailed on the receipt

issues.description: Total Amount Paid with breakdown of the total amount paid including VAT Sales, Zero-Rated Sales, VAT-Exempt Sales and 12% VAT is missing.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Total Amount Paid with breakdown of the total amount paid including VAT Sales, Zero-Rated Sales, VAT-Exempt Sales and 12% VAT

issues.description: Ensure the submitted documents are BIR registered and reflect the vendor's TIN, business name, and address, but the TIN number is missing.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider

issues.description: Ensure the submitted documents are BIR registered and reflect the vendor's TIN, business name, and address, but the vendor business address is missing.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Ensure the submitted documents are BIR registered and reflect the vendor's TIN, business name, and address

issues.description: GOGLOBAL PHILIPPINES, INC. TIN: 010-281-166-000 22/F Mega Tower, EDSA corner J. Vargas Avenue, Brgy. WackWack-Greenhills, Mandaluyong City must be shown on receipt, but it is missing.
issues.recommendation: Please ensure that the receipt includes the GoGlobal company name and address as per the requirement.

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing several mandatory fields including detailed item descriptions, total amount breakdown, vendor TIN number, vendor business address, and GoGlobal company name and address. These issues need to be addressed with the supplier or provider to ensure compliance with the country's receipt standards.
